hypothesis: Enhancing steric complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3/TM5/TM6 residues by introducing bulky hydrophobic residues at position 11 and aromatic residues at position 5 will increase selectivity margin by differentiating SSTR2 from off-target subtypes.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 binding and selectivity, but structural issues are limiting the pass rate. Tightening structural constraints and increasing candidate diversity will improve the overall quality of the designs.

proposed_changes.rationale: Structural failures suggest excessive clashes in the top candidates. Lowering the clash threshold will enforce better geometry and reduce structural QC failures.

The current number of candidates is too small to ensure robust sampling of the design space. Increasing the number of candidates will improve the chances of finding structurally valid, high-quality designs.
